diagrams.title: Memory Layout of C++ Program
diagrams.description: Shows different memory segments in a C++ program's address space
diagrams.purpose: Understanding where different types of variables and data are stored in memory

diagrams.title: Stack vs Heap Memory Allocation
diagrams.description: Comparison diagram showing characteristics of stack and heap memory
elements: Stack: Fast, Limited, Automatic, LIFO, Fixed size
Heap: Slower, Larger, Manual, Random access, Dynamic size
diagrams.purpose: Visualize the differences between stack and heap for memory management decisions

diagrams.title: Memory Leak Illustration
diagrams.description: Shows how memory leak occurs when delete is not called
elements: Over time heap grows, available memory shrinks
diagrams.purpose: Understanding consequences of forgetting to free dynamically allocated memory

diagrams.title: Dangling Pointer Scenario
diagrams.description: Visual representation of how dangling pointers arise
elements: Pointer P1 points to allocated memory
diagrams.purpose: Understanding dangling pointers and prevention methods
